Interzenex MicrofinanceBack to home

Grants & Aid

Banking should help members move forward, not hold them back. Here's how we give back beyond the account.

“A grant covered the deposit on our first storefront. We wouldn't have opened without it.”

Small Business Grants recipient, 2025 cohort

Small Business Grants

Non-repayable funding for qualifying small businesses looking to launch or expand, awarded quarterly.

Financial Literacy Program

Free workshops and one-on-one coaching to help members build budgeting and credit-building skills.

Hardship Assistance

Temporary fee waivers and flexible repayment plans for members facing unexpected financial hardship.

Interested in applying, or want to nominate a community partner? We'd love to hear from you.

Get in Touch
